name: Team Cory
subject: Have you entered to meet Rosario Dawson and Cory Booker yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Want to watch the next debate with Rosario Dawson? ...and talk about it over a meal with Cory and Rosario the next day? **We have good news for you. We 're flying one lucky contest winner and a friend out to Atlanta for the November debate!** **[All you have to do is donate today -- whatever you can -- and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191020_TC_20191020-fr-TC-Rocontest4-actives_actives_l1_V1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** You can chip in multiple times to increase your odds -- each donation automatically enters you for another chance to win! **Here 's a link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191020_TC_20191020-fr-TC-Rocontest4-actives_actives_l2_V1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Good luck!
Team Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191020_TC_20191020-fr-TC-Rocontest4-actives_actives_contribbutton_V1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by November 13, 2019. Enter by contributing[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1c/5fca0d19/76b61602/291fc0cb/3912844246/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario") or [click here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1c/5fca0d19/76b61602/291fc0ca/3912844246/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://bookerlive.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/Cory-and-Rosario-Contest") to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Atlanta, GA; one-night hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; opportunity to have a meal with Senator Booker and Rosario Dawson; opportunity to attend the November DNC Presidential Debate (approx. retail value $3,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1c/5fca0d19/76b61602/291fc0c9/3912844246/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/cory-rosario-you/"). Sponsor: Cory 2020, PO Box 32009, Newark, NJ 07102._
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1c/5fca0d19/76b61602/291fc0c8/3912844246/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1c/5fca0d19/76b61602/291fc0d7/3912844246/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1c/5fca0d19/76b61602/291fc0d6/3912844246/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1c/5fca0d19/76b61602/291fc0d5/3912844246/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1c/5fca0d19/76b61602/291fc0d4/3912844246/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1c/5fca0d19/76b61602/291fc0c8/3912844246/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Roger Lau
subject: I have some exciting news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We received our two millionth donation to this campaign today. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285281f6/45c30650/10d03f78c/66f31374/2352955920/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Do you have a second? I want to share some exciting news that I just got:

**We received our two millionth donation to this campaign today!**

Two million is an incredible milestone to reach. Every time this campaign receives a contribution, it's because someone felt inspired. It's because someone recognized their power in our democracy, and their ability to help shape our future and make big, structural change.

And when that moment happens over two million times -- when those feelings of inspiration and hope continue to increase -- well...I'd call that a movement.

Together we're fighting for a country that's more inclusive, more hopeful, and more democratic than ever before. And it's all thanks to grassroots donors.

**[But right now, we need to fight harder than ever. So, if you're able to, please chip in today to help grow our movement together. We can't do this without your support.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285281f6/45c30650/10d03f78c/66f31377/2352955920/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSzgyRl9UTUNfR1JNX1JfMjAxOTEwMjBfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK82F_TMC_GRM_R_20191020_V1S1_P")**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Flirting with socialism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
There's been a socialist resurgence within the Democratic party, and it's not some fringe movement. Even Senate Democrats are engaging in this dangerous flirtation with socialism and trying to market it as "free" government programs. | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53201819:WzfRm5wbN:m:1:2132176598:D9F13E0761CEA175FDFB4CBEB5ECD454:r)
---
Dear Peter,

Recently, there's been a socialist resurgence within the Democratic party, and it's not some fringe movement. Even Senate Democrats are engaging in this dangerous flirtation with socialism and trying to market it as "free" government programs.

Peter, you and I both know there's no such thing as free, and if Senate Democrats are allowed to continue down this path, it's going to cost all of us.

**[The good news is, it's not too late to put a stop to their extremism but we have to act now, and it starts with supporting Senator Martha McSally.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53201819:WzfRm5wbN:m:1:2132176598:D9F13E0761CEA175FDFB4CBEB5ECD454:r)**

| [ SUPPORT MARTHA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53201819:WzfRm5wbN:m:1:2132176598:D9F13E0761CEA175FDFB4CBEB5ECD454:r)
---

You see, Democrats only need to flip four Senate seats to seize the majority and they think they have a good shot at winning if they can defeat Martha and turn Arizona blue.

Since the day she joined the Senate, Martha has been a thorn in the Democrats' side because she's not afraid to call them out for their irrational ideology and aversion to pragmatism.

**[As a former fighter pilot who flew in combat, Martha knows the price of freedom, and she'll be the first to tell you there's no such thing as "free," especially when it comes to government.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53201819:WzfRm5wbN:m:1:2132176598:D9F13E0761CEA175FDFB4CBEB5ECD454:r)**

Martha's fighting for pragmatic policy solutions, but Democrats want no part of it, they just want her gone.

**[We can't let that happen, Peter,](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53201819:WzfRm5wbN:m:1:2132176598:D9F13E0761CEA175FDFB4CBEB5ECD454:r)** because as long Democrats willfully ignore the costly realities of their proposals, they have no place dictating our policies.

**[If you agree, join me in supporting Martha McSally today. This is a race we can't afford to lose.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53201819:WzfRm5wbN:m:1:2132176598:D9F13E0761CEA175FDFB4CBEB5ECD454:r)**

My very best,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53201819:WzfRm5wbN:m:1:2132176598:D9F13E0761CEA175FDFB4CBEB5ECD454:r)
Nikki Haley

[ SUPPORT MARTHA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53201819:WzfRm5wbN:m:1:2132176598:D9F13E0761CEA175FDFB4CBEB5ECD454:r)
---

| Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc.

clean_body: There's been a socialist resurgence within the Democratic party, and it's not some fringe movement. Even Senate Democrats are engaging in this dangerous flirtation with socialism and trying to market it as "free" government programs. | Dear Peter, Recently, there's been a socialist resurgence within the Democratic party, and it's not some fringe movement. Even Senate Democrats are engaging in this dangerous flirtation with socialism and trying to market it as "free" government programs. Peter, you and I both know there's no such thing as free, and if Senate Democrats are allowed to continue down this path, it's going to cost all of us. | You see, Democrats only need to flip four Senate seats to seize the majority and they think they have a good shot at winning if they can defeat Martha and turn Arizona blue. Since the day she joined the Senate, Martha has been a thorn in the Democrats' side because she's not afraid to call them out for their irrational ideology and aversion to pragmatism. Martha's fighting for pragmatic policy solutions, but Democrats want no part of it, they just want her gone. because as long Democrats willfully ignore the costly realities of their proposals, they have no place dictating our policies. My very best, Nikki Haley | Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system December 18, 2018. subject: I'm rushing you this news to defend our president

body:
The Democrats are relentless and their fundraising numbers are massive.
Don't want to receive any more emails? [Unsubscribe](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6429592/136068195/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5kbXNncy5uZXQvdT9pZD0xMzYwNjgxOTUuMTU3NDk2ZTNhYjU2NmU1NGRmOGE4YTlkYTIyYjY0OTImbj1UJmw9YS1ncyZvPTY0Mjk1OTI%3d&x=f4d10f09)
I'll get right to the point.

Democrats are doing everything in their power to _**IMPEACH**_ our president.

So, it's critical we do everything in our power to restore our Conservative majority.

_That's why I'm rushing you this news._

[**If 500 people step up before midnight, we can unlock 5X-MATCHING.**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6429592/136068195/108799/2/)
**Rush your immediate support for President Trump

[](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6429592/136068195/108799/3/)**

There is no doubt that putting the power back into the hands of strong Conservatives is essential. But this will be an incredible fight.

The Democrats are relentless and their fundraising numbers are massive.

Thankfully, I was told I could reach out to because you are a huge defender of our president. I'm relying on you to step up and help donations go 5X as far.

If it hasn't been clear over the past 10 months of the Democrats' ruthless majority, it is clear now what must be done. We must restore our power. We must win in 2020.

[**Defend your president and help us in this critical fight for our nation's future.**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6429592/136068195/108799/9/)

Thank you,
Kevin McCarthy

body:
I need your help to take down one of the top Democrats behind the illegitimate impeach effort against President Trump. | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53202747:s0_Hu5wNM:m:1:2185358397:457B67C2D2C1C03652501C414103415B:r)
---
Friend,

Third quarter fundraising reports are out, **and I'm officially the leading candidate** running in California's 33rd District against radical left-wing, Democrat Congressman Ted Lieu, one of the top Democrats behind the illegitimate impeachment effort against President Trump.

[**I need your help to take down Ted Lieu**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53202747:s0_Hu5wNM:m:1:2185358397:457B67C2D2C1C03652501C414103415B:r), and here's why:

**Ted Lieu** spent ALL his time in Congress pushing and pushing Nancy Pelosi to impeach President Trump until she finally caved to his demands - and he hasn't stopped there.

In fact, his **obsession** with the President has led him to completely ignore his suffering district.

Democrats are rapidly destroying California...
* We have the highest taxes and cost of living in the nation, and they want to raise them even higher
* After raising our gas taxes, Democrats are now **breaking their promise** to voters and diverting that money to other pet projects
* Poverty, homelessness, crime and drugs are creeping into our once-safe neighborhoods and threatening the safety of our children
* Illegal immigrants and prisoners are being prioritized over law-abiding and hard-working families

_Yet, Ted Lieu and his fellow Democrats would rather attack the President rather than fix the problems their own failed policies are creating!_

[**I need your help to take down Ted Lieu and restore representative leadership to California. Will you support my campaign with a donation of $10, $100 or any amount today?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53202747:s0_Hu5wNM:m:1:2185358397:457B67C2D2C1C03652501C414103415B:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53202747:s0_Hu5wNM:m:1:2185358397:457B67C2D2C1C03652501C414103415B:r)
I support President Trump's efforts to secure our borders. I stand firm in my belief that we must reduce wasteful government spending of our hard-earned tax dollars. And I believe government must be accountable to the People.

Ted Lieu and the Democrats are AGAINST all of these things. It's destroying California, and unless we eliminate the Democrats' control of the House, it could destroy our nation too.

[**I need your help to take down one of the top Democrats behind the illegitimate impeach effort against President Trump. Will you chip in $10, $100 or even more to help me defeat radical Ted Lieu?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53202747:s0_Hu5wNM:m:1:2185358397:457B67C2D2C1C03652501C414103415B:r)

Thanks,

Brandon Fricke
Candidate for Congress

[ **Defeat Pelosi & Ted Lieu ››**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53202747:s0_Hu5wNM:m:1:2185358397:457B67C2D2C1C03652501C414103415B:r)

name: Cory Booker
subject: We've fallen behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I'll be honest with you. Our fundraising has really slowed down in the past few days. It was a big setback when we set a goal of $53,740 -- and fell short. Here's why I'm concerned: we have a huge end-of-month deadline coming up on October 31st. If we don't ramp up our fundraising efforts right away, we're not going to be able to move forward with the big investments we need to win. That means we can't open more field offices in the early states, hire more field organizers, and won't be able to place ads so we can reach more voters. **These are things we can only do with your support. Can I count on you to chip in right now?** | If you've saved your payment information with
ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

When we issued a call to action last month that I would only stay in this race if we raised $1.7 million, this team stepped up in a way I never could've imagined. We have to recapture this momentum to bring in the resources needed to grow this campaign. I wish I could say that it's time to take it easy for a while. **But that 's not an option -- not if we want to win.**
**[Let's pick up the pace after these last few days. Pitch in a few dollars today if you can.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191021_CB_20191021-fr-CB-fallenbehind-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I know I can count on you.
Thank you,
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191021_CB_20191021-fr-CB-fallenbehind-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Andy
subject: Midnight tonight (Match runs out soon!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Our final reporting deadline is today. And when the reports are published next week, we want to prove to everyone watching that we have the strength to defeat Matt Bevin.
|
---

| | Peter,

I'm so thankful to have you as a part of my team -- **our last reporting deadline is midnight tonight** , and I need your help. **[Will you donate right now?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579ce/ad6dc73/145a8206/db7ec75/1052110052/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4MSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-finalreporting?refcode=20191021.1nd__381__&amount=5")** It's your last chance to have your gift matched to double your impact!

We launched this campaign to secure a better future for Kentucky, and **it 's personal for me**. I grew up in Kentucky, and my kids, Will and Lila, are growing up here now. And with so many families across the commonwealth struggling to make ends meet, I know we need to do everything we can to build a Kentucky where our families and children have a real path to prosperity. That's what our campaign is all about.

Over the past few months, we've talked to countless voters and knocked on doors until we wore our shoes through. But these last few days will be our hardest. **Our final reporting deadline is today.** And when the reports are published next week, we want to prove to everyone watching that we have the strength to defeat Matt Bevin.

**Will you donate just a few dollars to help us hit our goal before our FINAL deadline and build a better future for Kentucky? Any amount will help, and all gifts are MATCHED to help us win on Election Day.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: DEMO MEMO: Jim Justice Takes Advantage of Government Assistance
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
**DEMO MEMO: Governor Jim Justice continues to take advantage of federal assistance.****The West Virginia Republican Party continues to defend a self-serving governor with multiple unresolved conflicts of interest.**
**The West Virginia Republican Party supports this type of corruption and the people of West Virginia are on the losing end. **
🔴 Farmers are being hurt by [President Trump](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11075656/112331548/278750754?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTM3YTMzYS0zMmY0LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFf9fhJlW21OomzPgxUni1DFVCZBWSJXlZ8ceR4vi-Y=&emci=bc49f188-2ef4-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=d937a33a-32f4-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=5094937&__tn__=K-R&eid=ARAxVp_7FXDuoSGXUJdO9SbOxrcnhVrqHGgIIWqTEydRSL5Iyze66E8BBIQyilJAa8zeThmhv6vwlwT_&fref=mentions&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARCSvI4PGCG-kb_L1x3m4uRBOkagWz6PDZzGdZwURyd2CsxKApVvizMlk6yEr79MqwgGzBkgUqNgrJmfRANuRxWuwqux9mNGIlEotqycTqrNZboELd0nJ7ZYCFSHwPhZfaI0dSwFlbc47KuxZE8_0cfmiqHnQDxkHBLmB4RBtGyIWKdFQO_Zz55xPvjw4OeeWGMpAtuihABituRiwGgPNllktfKaCY83VJ71ZMcdXEGSeFQDA3BWDJv-Zh9Ff5RaqCwiUcCIssq53B-SK-o2uQFYrX2q5OO6elDNLdWPsIHSnCWxa07Xn0R6cJ9eJPlVOy3eV6j0SsqdtvYpPysh)’s trade war. So much so that he is having to provide government subsidies.
🔴 This assistance is intended to help farmers feed their families while suffering from Trump’s trade war. Assistance that Jim Justice does not need.
🔴 Governor Jim Justice received the maximum amount of assistance: **$125,000. **
🔴 This isn’t the first time Justice has benefited from federal assistance intended to help others.
🔴 Last year he included his luxury Greenbrier Resort in a federal opportunity zone.
🔴 Opportunity zones are intended to help struggling, underdeveloped communities, not give the wealthiest man in West Virginia tax breaks.

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.

Charleston , WV 25339
United States

name: Jill Vogel
subject: REMINDER: You Are Invited To The Atoka Country Supper!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
Please join Alex & I as we bring back this Historic event!
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

I am delighted to announce that Senator John Warner joins me in the revival of his legendary Atoka Country Supper. His annual event promoted civility, fellowship and a strong sense of community among neighbors and friends for a generation. It was made famous by his guests President Ronald and Nancy Reagan, President George H.W. Bush, and Warner's wife actress Elizabeth Taylor. He has been eager to have us bring back that fun event and has given me wonderful articles, photos and memorabilia to share. Please join us to be with friends, hear from Senator Warner, and enjoy music and Shaffer's BBQ - Sunday, October 27th at our home, 3:30 pm to 6:00 pm!
Checks can be mailed to: Vogel For Senate 45 N Hill Drive Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186
---
|
---
|
---
|

clean_body: Please join Alex & I as we bring back this Historic event! | | | | | | | | | | Friends, I am delighted to announce that Senator John Warner joins me in the revival of his legendary Atoka Country Supper. His annual event promoted civility, fellowship and a strong sense of community among neighbors and friends for a generation. It was made famous by his guests President Ronald and Nancy Reagan, President George H.W. Bush, and Warner's wife actress Elizabeth Taylor. He has been eager to have us bring back that fun event and has given me wonderful articles, photos and memorabilia to share. Please join us to be with friends, hear from Senator Warner, and enjoy music and Shaffer's BBQ - Sunday, October 27th at our home, 3:30 pm to 6:00 pm! Checks can be mailed to: Vogel For Senate 45 N Hill Drive Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186 | | | | == | Sincerely, | | Senator Jill Vogel | | | Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186 | Follow Jill on Facebook and Twitter for Campaign Updates == == == | | Vogel for Senate | 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100, Warrenton, VA 20186 | | Sent by mailto:info@senatorjillvogel.com in collaboration with |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Pelosi-Schiff Impeachment Farce Has No Respect for Due Process
body:
"Earlier this week, Rep. Denny Heck, a Democratic member of the House Intelligence Committee, told reporters that Republicans ‘are darn lucky..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=edfe79d010&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Pelosi-Schiff Impeachment Farce Has No Respect for Due Process**

“Earlier this week, Rep. Denny Heck, a Democratic member of the House Intelligence Committee, told reporters that Republicans ‘are darn lucky these [impeachment hearings and depositions] weren’t public,’” Rep. Andy Biggs (R-AZ) writes in the _Washington Examiner_.

“Implication: The information coming out is horrifically damaging to President Trump. Reality: If the information was truly damaging to Trump, Democrats would hold open hearings and would have already released transcripts of the testimonies.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=714cb1a215&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Developing countries that want to do business with the United States must do more to empower women and give them better access to the workforce, education and legal protections, White House adviser Ivanka Trump said on Friday,” Andrea Shalal reports for _[Reuters](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6ec8a2a38c&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “The 2017 tax reform law was a once-in-a-generation tax cut for America’s families, small businesses, and workers. A huge part of that victory was that we were able to bring hope and prosperity to communities that have been left behind through new Opportunity Zones,” Sen. Tim Scott (R-SC) writes in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=447b869644&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “Both men accused of a horrific gang-related murder in the Seattle area last week are illegal immigrants, ICE said on Thursday, heaping more attention on the region’s sanctuary city policies,” Stephen Dinan reports for _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7debd9c26b&e=3ee4985eea). _Both men have ties to MS-13.

---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74f030aa67&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf411b1f6e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=d4b95b0c9a)
---

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: [POLL] Susan Collins loses to Democrats by THREE POINTS!
body:
This race is so close.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca7/4bef7a87/6b28700d/287fd07b/2027211003/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends, this is big!
A major polling group just released a new poll which has Susan Collins losing to Democrats by** THREE POINTS**.
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca7/4bef7a87/6b28700d/287fd07a/2027211003/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191021-full")
This poll proves that Maine's Senate seat is poised to flip - but we can't get too comfortable. Susan Collins is a 22-year incumbent. Defeating her and her special interest backers will be _incredibly_ difficult.
**That 's why we're starting the hard work now, and it's why we have to ask: **
[**Make a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign for U.S. Senate now. We're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so your donation goes a very long way towards helping us win. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca7/4bef7a87/6b28700d/287fd07a/2027211003/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191021-full")
Listen, Mitch McConnell isn't just going to let us walk into a Senate seat. He knows this race will be close, so he'll spend whatever it takes to help Collins win.
We have a big fight ahead of us,
\- Team Sara
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca7/4bef7a87/6b28700d/287fd07a/2027211003/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191021-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Elisa Cardnell
subject: When is enough, enough?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11075897/112332906/1785235803?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ3ZjNmYy0zNGY0LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SscalsNffkWMecYvzFOipJbHRJl6rJTKIvMYXnUPeRA=&refcode=header)
Peter,
**291 mass shootings in 2019 so far. Think about that number for a second.**
Until our leaders take action, it’s not a question of if there will be another mass shooting. It’s when there will be another mass shooting.
**This isn’t about Republicans vs. Democrats or partisan gimmicks. This is about taking the initiative to protect innocent lives from the next mass shooting.**
But the deafening silence from our leadership in Washington gives the impression that commonsense gun reform isn't essential to the American people.
Peter, it’s widely known that **90% of Americans support gun safety bills like universal background checks. But Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell refuses to take action on gun legislation.** This is an EMERGENCY - period.
As the representative for Texas' 2nd Congressional District, I will always put our communities and our children above the NRA and partisan politics - **but we must demand our leaders in Congress to take action immediately.**
_[**Peter, will you sign this petition to urge Congress to pass gun safety laws already passed in the House?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11075899/112332908/-1679108060?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ3ZjNmYy0zNGY0LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SscalsNffkWMecYvzFOipJbHRJl6rJTKIvMYXnUPeRA=&emci=4731864a-0ef4-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=c1d7f3fc-34f4-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)_
Thank you for all that you do,
Elisa Cardnell
****[SIGN ON HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11075901/112332911/-1679108060?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ3ZjNmYy0zNGY0LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SscalsNffkWMecYvzFOipJbHRJl6rJTKIvMYXnUPeRA=&emci=4731864a-0ef4-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=c1d7f3fc-34f4-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)****

subject: We’re in a tough primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1902%2E377263%2EVxH_JV) Yang Gang --

Andrew fights for the people -- not the special interests or the establishment.

**That’s why he’s not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money, and an overwhelming majority of our fundraising comes from grassroots donors giving small amounts -- not wealthy donors.**

But right now we’re in a tough primary against well-funded opponents with big head starts and even bigger lists of high-dollar donors -- and if we don't hit our fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow we could fall even further behind in Iowa. [Can you pitch in $5 or more?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14722?t=5&akid=1902%2E377263%2EVxH_JV)

We have until midnight to hit this goal.

And hitting this goal -- or falling short -- will make the difference in our Iowa investments before the end of October. **We need you to pitch in now if you want to send Andrew to the White House:** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14722?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=1902%2E377263%2EVxH_JV)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: I'm asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I wanted to make sure you heard directly from me. **If I can 't raise $800,000 in the next 10 days -- I will have no choice but to end my race for President.** [_**I 'm asking you to fight for me like never before. If I don't meet this deadline, I won't have the resources to keep my campaign running. I'm counting on your $5 in this critical moment. >> **_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191021_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") This isn't a fundraising gimmick -- it's the transparency and honesty I have promised you since I entered this race. The truth is, for our campaign, these debates have offered our only guaranteed opportunity to share my vision with the American people. If I can't make the next debate stage, we cannot sustain a campaign that can make it to Iowa in February. **My presidential campaign is in dire need of financial resources to keep going. ** According to the Washington Post, a qualifying poll is coming out every two days. So I'm asking for the money we need to qualify for the debate with enough time left to actually meet the deadline. [_**Unless I 'm able to raise $800,000 by October 31st, we won't make the November debate stage and our campaign will have to shut down. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191021_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") All the progress we've made is in serious jeopardy. I started this campaign on a shoestring budget in the neighborhood I grew up in. I didn't grow up a frontrunner. I didn't have personal wealth to pump into this race. And we've built this campaign without a cent from super PACS or billionaires. **I 've spent every second in this race fighting for folks who have struggled like I did.** Now, I'm asking you to fight for me. Can I count on your immediate $5 by midnight to keep my campaign running? _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf9f/3eb3e2fc/54cd1535/744deb1b/1588554732/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191021_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1")
---

[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf9f/3eb3e2fc/54cd1535/744deb1a/1588554732/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20191021_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1")

For everyone who feels like their voice has been discounted and cast aside.

Every child wondering why no President has ever looked like them.

Every parent struggling to lift their family out of poverty.

**I want you to know: You have a home here with our movement -- you are who I 'm fighting for. **

[_**Right now, I 'm asking you to fight for me. I need to raise $800,000 by the next 10 days to replenish my campaign and make the next debates. Otherwise, I will have no choice but to end my race. I'm humbly asking: Will you rush $5 to keep me in the race? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191021_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

I've spent this campaign working to be a champion for the underrepresented.

We've led boldly with plans on police reform, gun violence, boosting our public schools, and crafting humane immigration policies.

So when I ask you to help me in the next 10 days, it's not about me.

It's about every single person who needs a champion fighting for them.

[_**I need your help to keep me in this race. Will you rush $5 before midnight? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191021_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Thank you,

Julian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf9f/3eb3e2fc/54cd1535/744deb07/1588554732/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro")

| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf9f/3eb3e2fc/54cd1535/744deb06/1588554732/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf9f/3eb3e2fc/54cd1535/744deb05/1588554732/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf9f/3eb3e2fc/54cd1535/744deb04/1588554732/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf9f/3eb3e2fc/54cd1535/744deb03/1588554732/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf9f/3eb3e2fc/54cd1535/744deb02/1588554732/VEsHAA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Friend,

I just saw the most recent list of Patriots who have contributed to win a trip to meet me in Chicago on October 28th, and I noticed you _STILL_ haven't entered.

|
I really want to meet you. I'm having a very important, very exclusive lunch that day, and I can't think of anyone else I'd rather share it with.

You've always been such a strong supporter, so I've decided to unlock a special _**DOUBLE-ENTRY**_ just for you. _This offer will only be available for the next 24 HOURS,_ so don't pass this up!

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name if you agree: Every kid in America should have the same access to a high-quality public education
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Ultra-Millionaire Tax, a two cent tax on fortunes above $50 million
body:
Every kid in America should have the same access to a high-quality public education -- no matter what zip code they live in, the color of their skin, or how much money their parents make. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852812b/45c30650/102e30d1f/66f31988/304749727/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Growing up in Oklahoma, all I ever wanted was to be a public school teacher.

My life had a lot of twists and turns along the way, but after I graduated from a public university where tuition cost only $50 a semester, I got to live my dream as a special education teacher at a public school in New Jersey.

I believe in America's public schools, and I believe that **every kid in America should have the same access to a high-quality public education -- no matter what zip code they live in, the color of their skin, or how much money their parents make.**

And right now, we're not living up to that promise.

Betsy DeVos has been a disaster as Secretary of Education, but the truth is that funding for public K-12 education has been both inadequate and inequitable for a long, long time. Right now, we're failing to treat public school teachers, paraprofessionals, and school staff like the professionals that they are. We need to pay them well, listen to them, and give them the support that they need.

**We can do so much better for our students, our educators, and our communities, so that's why today I'm releasing my K-12 public education plan that will:**
1. Fund schools adequately and equitably so that all students have access to a great public education.
2. Renew the fight against segregation and discrimination in our schools.
3. Provide a warm, safe, and nurturing school climate for all our kids.
4. Treat teachers and staff like the professionals they are.
5. Stop the privatization and corruption of our public education system.

And it would all be paid for by the Ultra-Millionaire Tax, a two cent tax on fortunes above $50 million.

**[Our students, public school educators, and parents deserve a president that will fight for them-- and that's the kind of president I'll be. Add your name here if you support my plan to provide a great public school education to every student.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852812b/45c30650/102e30d1f/66f3198b/304749727/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUs4MEZfUkxUX0VEVV9FXzIwMTkxMDIxX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-education-plan?source=EMK80F_RLT_EDU_E_20191021_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Here's how we'll get it done.

**-> First, we're going to invest hundreds of billions of dollars into our public schools (paid for by the Ultra-Millionaire Tax).**

That means we'll be able to _quadruple_ Title I funding -- an additional $450 billion over the next 10 years -- to help every child get a high-quality public education. And we'll make that additional funding conditional on states improving their commitment to educational funding themselves.

We'll finally make good on our promise to fully fund IDEA -- committing an additional $20 billion a year to ensure that students with disabilities receive the educational services they are entitled to.

My plan would invest an additional $100 billion in "Excellence Grants", which would give schools the chance to invest in programs and resources that they believe are most important to their students.

Finally, my plan would invest at least an additional $50 billion in infrastructure in schools across the country, targeted at those that need it most.

**-> We'll renew the fight against segregation and discrimination in our public schools.**

Integrated communities help create a society built on mutual respect and understanding, and integrated schools -- which are demanded by our Constitution's guarantee of equal protection to every person in this country -- improve educational outcomes for students of all races.

That's why I'm committed to strengthening Title VI of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 -- which prohibits discrimination on the basis of race in any program or activity that receives federal funding -- and reviving robust enforcement of its terms.

My plan uses federal education funding to encourage states to further integrate their schools, and my administration will strictly enforce the right of students with disabilities to a free and appropriate public education and will protect the rights of LGBTQ+ students, English Language Learners, and immigrant students and their families.

**-> We'll ensure every student has the opportunity to learn in a traditional public school that's welcoming and safe.**

My plan will expand access to early childhood services and education, eliminate high-stakes testing, and cancel student breakfast and lunch debt to ensure the federal government plays its part in trying to bring a positive and nurturing climate to every school.

We'll also create safer environments for our students by ending zero-tolerance discipline policies, establishing more School-Based Health Centers in communities in health professional shortage areas, providing better access to career and college readiness, and addressing chronic absenteeism without punishing parents or children.

**-> My plan works with states to sustainably improve pay and support for all public school educators -- and as president, I will fight for our educators and treat them like the professionals that they are.**

That means making sure that classrooms are well-equipped with resources and support so that teachers aren't paying for school supplies out of pocket. We'll also ensure that anyone can become a teacher without drowning in student loan debt.

In a Warren Administration, public educators will have a seat at the table -- and that starts with strengthening the ability of educators to organize and bargain. And we're going to invest in students by investing in our educators -- by providing continuing education and professional development opportunities to all school staff and building up a more diverse educator and school leadership pipeline.

**-> To keep our traditional public school systems strong, we must resist efforts to divert public funds out of traditional public schools.**

We have a responsibility to provide great neighborhood schools for every student. Under my plan, we'll eliminate the charter school funding program and end federal funding to the expansion of charter schools.

We'll ban for-profit charter schools, end privatization, corporatization, and profiteering in our nation's schools and crack down on corruption and anti-competitive practices in the education industry.

**It's time to live up to the promise of a high-quality public education for every student. My plan makes the big, structural changes that will help give every student, teacher, and school administrator the resources they need to thrive.**

**[Will you add your name to show your support for my K-12 education plan?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852812b/45c30650/102e30d1f/66f3198b/304749727/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUs4MEZfUkxUX0VEVV9FXzIwMTkxMDIxX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-education-plan?source=EMK80F_RLT_EDU_E_20191021_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852812b/45c30650/102e30d1f/66f3198b/304749727/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUs4MEZfUkxUX0VEVV9FXzIwMTkxMDIxX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-education-plan?source=EMK80F_RLT_EDU_E_20191021_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump can't stop putting his foot in his mouth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, You would think if the House of Representatives were investigating you in an impeachment inquiry, you'd do everything you could to not implicate yourself further. Not Trump, though. He thinks that he should host world leaders at his Doral resort \-- another possible impeachable offense of violating the Emoluments Clause of the Constitution. While he's backed down from that plan now, his lackeys in the White House aren't doing much better. Mick Mulvaney, the acting chief of staff, appeared to confirm the Ukraine "quid pro quo" that Trump has denied for weeks before backing off after realizing what he'd done. The White House is defiant through it all, though, claiming it will not cooperate with the impeachment inquiry, setting up additional constitutional crises. With House Democrats moving forward with an inquiry into impeachment, we'd like to know what your thoughts are of Donald Trump. Can you take our quick poll: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda3/6e9863e8/15aee0e2/1db0f254/3031917382/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ILp8ntGv") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda3/6e9863e8/15aee0e2/1db0f254/3031917382/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ILp8ntGv") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda3/6e9863e8/15aee0e2/1db0f25b/3031917382/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191021a.ND&refcode2=8M8XwzJ0ShzPllHVxLq9")

subject: Trump GAINING in the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of John Delaney
body:
| [ ](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b90383/30fd46cd/32ee2382/23548649/971685501/VEsH/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=1+-+++&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.10.21_e1_td_mid-month_all&source=em_fr_2019.10.21_e1_td_mid-month_all") Hey there --

If you're following the news, you know that it seems Trump does something every day to disqualify him from the presidency.

But a few days ago, **a shocking new poll came out showing that Trump was actually GAINING in popularity with independents when compared to far-left candidates like Warren and Bernie.**

We've been saying this from the start: _If we want to defeat Donald Trump in 2020, we can't rally behind a far-left platform of unachievable promises._

We need a candidate with real solutions who can reach across the aisle and make real change. **That 's why we need John Delaney. name: Watchdogs@HattersleyForCongress
subject: How would you grade Ross Spano?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
------------------------- YOUR FEEDBACK REQUESTED -------------------------

Hi Peter,

It’s been almost one full year since Ross Spano was elected to Congress to represent FL-15. In that time he’s been the focus of a House Ethics investigation , admitted that he may have violated campaign finance laws , voted against the Equality Act , a piece of legislation that would provide protection to the members of the LGBTQIA+ community from being unjustly fired, spent his free time bragging about taking selfies with Donald Trump , and repeatedly doubled down on his denial of climate change .

So with all this in mind, how do YOU think Ross Spano is doing? Fill out your report card below to let Ross Spano know how you rate his job performance

How would you grade Ross Spano’s job performance?
A » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/poll_ah?refcode=Em_poll_2019.10.21_b1_W_all_A&amount=5&recurring=1]

D » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/poll_ah?refcode=Em_poll_2019.10.21_b1_W_all_D&amount=5&recurring=1]

Give Spano an F! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/poll_ah?refcode=Em_poll_2019.10.21_b1_W_all_F&amount=5&recurring=1]

Adam Hattersley is Navy Veteran and local state representative working to flip Florida's 15th Congressional District.
Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Adam's campaign?

CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q42019refcode=Em_poll_2019.10.21_b1_W_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1]

Adam Hattersley is running to represent Florida's 15th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit hattersleyforcongress.com

name: Tommy Tuberville
subject: Please open – deadline today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
We’ve been working hard to raise critical ad funds. The response has been outstanding, and we only have $4,352 to go. I’m writing today to ask, one last time:
Peter, We’ve been working hard to raise critical ad funds. The response has been outstanding, and we only have $4,352 to go. I’m writing today to ask, one last time: **[Will you chip in now to help deliver my unfiltered message to voters across Alabama?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/835c8ea6f5790cd4/55e71d8c3121098cc3d6b838967d376c/33013)** As you know, I’m not in this race to start a political “career” in Washington. I’m going to donate my salary, and I’ve signed a pledge to support term limits. I’m running because I believe in God, America, and family... _and I’m sick and tired of watching everything we value come under attack from the “politically correct” left!_ Alabama deserve a U.S. Senator who shares our values. **I’m off the sidelines, running to serve YOU.** We’re gotten off to a strong start in this race, and we’re not letting up. I hope to count on your sustaining support along the way, right up until we defeat Doug Jones. **[If you want to help us reach our goal – and reach the voters that will decide this top 2020 U.S. Senate race – follow this link to donate today.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/835c8ea6f5790cd4/4877136810932950c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** Our deadline is at 5:00 p.m. \- Coach Tuberville | |
---
Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc.
|
---

This email was sent by: Tommy Tuberville
210 Virginia Avenue, Auburn, AL, 36830
To view your profile center, go [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c&c=33013&jid=835c8ea6f5790cd4)

To view this email as a web page, click [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/vm2/835c8ea6f5790cd4/33013/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

name: Addisu Demissie
subject: The countdown has begun
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, The next debate is less than one month away! (30 days to be exact, but who's counting?) We're already starting to prepare for whatever may happen on stage, but first we want to hear your thoughts on the last debate. **Will you take our survey about which issues were -- and were not -- covered in last week 's debate?** Here's a link: **[https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/post-debate-four-survey](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/post-debate-four-survey?source=em_su_20191021_AD_20191021-su-AD-debatesurvey2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Let's do this,
Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ I've been thinking a lot about this week's debate, team. And I can't help but feel that for voters tuning in for the first time to see what we as Democrats have to offer, a lot of our party's core priorities were left out of the conversation. **[The fifth debate will be here before we know it. But before I start to prepare, I want to hear from you. What issues do you wish were discussed at this week's debate?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/post-debate-four-survey?source=em_su_20191021_AD_20191021-su-AD-debatesurvey2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I've been on the campaign trail for over eight months, talking to folks across the country about the issues that matter most to them -- so many of which got far too little attention during the debate. **Let me be clear. This election is about far more than just what was talked about on stage.** Too much time was devoted to Republican talking points, including Donald Trump's false attacks on one of our own, and trying to draw lines between us when what we should have been doing was coming together in common cause against our country's divisive leader. **[I want to know what you thought. Will you take our survey to let our campaign know which issues you felt were left out?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/post-debate-four-survey?source=em_su_20191021_AD_20191021-su-AD-debatesurvey2-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** As always, thank you. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/post-debate-four-survey?source=em_su_20191021_AD_20191021-su-AD-debatesurvey2-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1e/5fca0d19/76bdd584/291fdcf2/3848991771/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1e/5fca0d19/76bdd584/291fdcf1/3848991771/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1e/5fca0d19/76bdd584/291fdcf0/3848991771/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1e/5fca0d19/76bdd584/291fdcff/3848991771/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1e/5fca0d19/76bdd584/291fdcfe/3848991771/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a1e/5fca0d19/76bdd584/291fdcf2/3848991771/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Let's talk about impeachment.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We're all doing our part -- it's time they do theirs.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/impeachment-petition/?utm_source=ema_2019-10-14&refcode=ema_2019-10-14&utm_campaign=&utm_medium=ema&t=3&akid=7967%2E868730%2Em4xtTC) Friend, Let's talk for a second about President Trump: To put it plainly -- of course the president has broken the law. That's why we've taken him to court 50 times and haven't lost once. **Now, it's time for him to be impeached.** Washington state is doing its job. Americans across the country are doing their job by making their voices heard, and House Democrats are doing their job by starting this inquiry. There is enough evidence to impeach by the president's own admission of asking for foreign assistance against his 2020 political rival, former Vice President Joe Biden -- but it's time Republicans get on board to do their job and join the rest of the county in taking action. **Impeachment shouldn't be taken lightly, and it shouldn't be about a political disagreement -- impeachment should be about a threat to our democracy.** [**That's why I'm speaking out today: Join our call to congressional Republicans to take action on impeachment now -- add your name.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/impeachment-petition/?utm_source=ema_2019-10-14&refcode=ema_2019-10-14&utm_campaign=&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=7967%2E868730%2Em4xtTC) | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/impeachment-petition/?utm_source=ema_2019-10-14&refcode=ema_2019-10-14&utm_campaign=&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=7967%2E868730%2Em4xtTC)
---
I'm grateful to Democrats in Congress and the American people for aggressively taking action on this.
Americans need that aggression in the pursuit of justice and truth. I believe that fervently. There was a time when even some elected Republicans believed in putting country before party, but it's something we've seen less and less from them over time, and it has accelerated since Donald Trump was elected. Now's a critical moment: If there was ever a time to put our constitution and our country first, _that time is now._
I've thought for a while that impeachment is inevitable. Donald Trump's recent words and actions only make me believe that even more strongly -- in fact, I'm not sure how anyone _doesn't_ believe impeachment is both necessary and warranted.
**That's why we need to speak out now, loud and clear, with one succinct message: Republicans in Congress have a constitutional mandate to act on impeachment. And they must act now.** [**Add your name next to mine right now if you agree.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/impeachment-petition/?utm_source=ema_2019-10-14&refcode=ema_2019-10-14&utm_campaign=&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=7967%2E868730%2Em4xtTC)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/impeachment-petition/?utm_source=ema_2019-10-14&refcode=ema_2019-10-14&utm_campaign=&utm_medium=ema&t=7&akid=7967%2E868730%2Em4xtTC)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=7967%2E868730%2Em4xtTC). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---
All content (C) 2019 JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D), All Rights Reserved

name: MarkWarnerVA.com
subject: Republicans are bringing in Pence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Republicans are in serious danger of losing the Virginia General Assembly on November 5th and they know it.
|
---
| | | **ALERT: Mike Pence Coming to Virginia**
**We need your help to fight back**
**Supporter:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donation to Fight Back Fund:** Not Yet
**Donate to Mark's Fight Back Fund[HERE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d02b/53d9897e/521b4462/1c8acfc7/693294257/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-penceva?refcode=20191021nd__290__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**
---
Derek,

Republicans are in _serious_ danger of losing the Virginia General Assembly on November 5th and they know it. **So now they're pulling out all the stops by bringing Vice President Pence in at the 11th hour to hold a rally.**

Republicans think that Pence's visit will translate into a win for them -- but we know Democrats can translate it into even stronger motivation to turn (and keep) Virginia blue!

**[Will you donate now to Mark Warner's Fight Back Fund to show Pence that Virginia will elect Democrats-- now and in 2020?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d02b/53d9897e/521b4462/1c8acfc6/693294257/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-penceva?refcode=20191021nd__290__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

**Mark has campaigned hard for Democratic General Assembly candidates. He knows that Democrats across the commonwealth must do _everything they can_ to support each other.** But Republicans aren't backing down: Trump's already investing heavily, training volunteers, and hiring staff in Virginia with his "victory initiative." Now Pence's upcoming visit underscores the administration's determination to woo Virginia voters in 2020.

But they underestimate us: Virginians have been fighting back against the abuses of the Trump administration since the very beginning. Now, with just 18 days until the election, **will you support Mark's Fight Back Fund to show Pence that Virginia Democrats are committed to making Virginia blue in November and in 2020?**
[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d02b/53d9897e/521b4462/1c8acfc5/693294257/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-penceva?express_lane=true&refcode=20191021nd__290__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")

clean_body: Republicans are in serious danger of losing the Virginia General Assembly on November 5th and they know it. | | | | ALERT: Mike Pence Coming to Virginia We need your help to fight back Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donation to Fight Back Fund: Not Yet Donate to Mark's Fight Back Fund "" Derek, Republicans are in serious danger of losing the Virginia General Assembly on November 5th and they know it. So now they're pulling out all the stops by bringing Vice President Pence in at the 11th hour to hold a rally. Republicans think that Pence's visit will translate into a win for them -- but we know Democrats can translate it into even stronger motivation to turn (and keep) Virginia blue! "" Mark has campaigned hard for Democratic General Assembly candidates. He knows that Democrats across the commonwealth must do everything they can to support each other. But Republicans aren't backing down: Trump's already investing heavily, training volunteers, and hiring staff in Virginia with his "victory initiative." Now Pence's upcoming visit underscores the administration's determination to woo Virginia voters in 2020. But they underestimate us: Virginians have been fighting back against the abuses of the Trump administration since the very beginning. Now, with just 18 days until the election, will you support Mark's Fight Back Fund to show Pence that Virginia Democrats are committed to making Virginia blue in November and in 2020? "" ** "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Your friends at Warner Headquarters ** ""**** | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

## "Dancing with the Stars" is on tonight!
---
| | I've made it halfway through this competition and I appreciate all of your support and votes.

Lindsay and I are dancing 7th tonight and performing a Viennese Waltz, so please tune in and cast your votes for us right at 8pm ET!
---
| | | | **_How to vote:_**

You can submit 20 votes total for Sean and Lindsay. Please make sure to cast all 20.

You can submit 10 votes by texting SEAN to 21523. Each text is one vote, you have to send SEAN 10 times to submit all 10 votes.

You can submit 10 additional votes online at [ABC.com](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3658296d62&e=f6564bbe3b). You need to start by making an account [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=60fbf1a576&e=f6564bbe3b) (which you can do now before voting opens).

When voting begins you login and can add 10 votes for Sean and Lindsay, #TeamSweetandSpicey.

Only votes cast during the live show (8-9:55pm count) so consider setting a calendar reminder for 8pm ET. For those in Mountain or Pacific time zones you can still vote but it has to happen while the show is live on the east coast (6-8pm CT and 5-7pm PT).
All the information on making an ABC account and other FAQs are [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e250e242f5&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| Follow along on my instagram @seanmspicer for a behind the scenes look at show day and more voting updates.
---
| Thanks again everyone,

_Sean_
---

Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=1530a5cabdf745ebb4b248583311f624&_e=ZR_1TpqeN_U5-WrA6JHVOv9WAkShBRXEkk_v0U-uflF3jCDILdHy24eT7exnJJWvXPo3_IsRFVZ_LbsZzukF8Xf7wRBWXz0b_jgsUfDQ_rxGSUvpCEAS0M5Pmoy-tXoMOibtF2X_qiiCvd5U3ip9XCKiF4KcBqxNuivKeD8OGNarMd_1XXGkK8SgJHeAPeZ-uHpLcFwKDqJzOqiUh1ADfF_-vM112dhRbPp5IJI18pLBYLZgTs1Kq3sRGq32-BMVZaTMggt5bFPvs0R-UZu8VQ%3D%3D) and [Twitter](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=1530a5cabdf745ebb4b248583311f624&_e=ZR_1TpqeN_U5-WrA6JHVOqQJG5qsisrTk_-r7yhmSTWPMTOvz8W12G7MAhq6IAzdNvMgyS55rbJuJ1CCDmM1r4j6g98oDhGpo6MrHqYx5yd_cB-LEGzE5445Rlh3cJp8xvFZpQ18QPwgm5rC3Ufl17IaWMvXOiwS9I-Yi22K61XwOqaxAbKHUPHwo3_JPwzrsVy3IFvHvjFw26HGLZJ671WSZbBfsVE433kLunGTfnDPTcdhCjjVNhBu0pAdNdAvRxLqG1kLHkcwMINHv99Acg%3D%3D) – that way you’ll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you’re still reading this, we know you’re _really_ ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=1530a5cabdf745ebb4b248583311f624&_e=ZR_1TpqeN_U5-WrA6JHVOlsczojB3AMHorUD55qfoeTt9cxORqD5bJeFXGaldodmKs6qbfdk_n2wPsixl7_kq-u9JQkOtVQ6BA-J6qziOtCfWla8FyK9Z7WoC7es5F4f5qBUAe7PS5ZQUT4tuMU6Sa__rioBi3bXHxb23ehXDGwPLZjs-7MBjYF1Vo-tbsbZCG1cxIlJQyh31Hgq2btmhxcLWiJA16jxO3RcaLYKzf_9-h3G1WmH7BJbpTZ3eSs8kUW_v60cv5OpdbJdJNrJjzh-Iq8c2qgNhju1dDrfaz4%3D) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. I am giving away 100 Cornyn Lead Friend, Are you a Republican in Texas who deeply cares about keeping Texas red? If you are, I have a special offer for you. I am giving away 100 Cornyn Leadership Team Pins, a Texas flag you can wear proudly right on your shirt. If you aren’t on my Leadership Team, this is your final chance to join. If you are already on my Leadership Team and in my inner circle, then this will show your loyalty to keeping Texas red. ** This is a rare opportunity that I am offering you. Few of my colleagues in the Senate give this much leadership responsibility to their constituents, but I am different. I know that you can make a difference in Texas. I believe that you are a born-leader, ready to stand up against the far-left to secure a conservative future for Texas. This pin will show it. ** Friend, thank you for being such a strong leader of Republicans in Texas. Your support is needed, so I thank you! John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Nancy Pelosi isn't backing down against Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, This weekend, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi made unannounced visits to Afghanistan and Jordan to assure allies that the U.S. still stands with them after Trump signalled that the U.S. will not uphold its commitments with the retreat from Syria. She's doing the work a competent president should be doing, all while pushing back against Trump and leading an impeachment inquiry. This is what we mean when we say standing up to Trump: ([Via President Trump's Twitter](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda5/6e9863e8/15a809bf/1db0f2b0/2461258656/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1184597281808498688")) Nancy Pelosi asserting her constitutional powers as Speaker of the House, keeping the president and his cabinet in check. Holding him accountable for his abuses of power, insults, and attacks on our democracy. Facing down a table of men and firmly standing her ground. We want to hear from Democratic voters what they think: **Do you stand with Nancy Pelosi?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda5/6e9863e8/15a809bf/1db0f2b7/2461258656/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Btu5K4pE") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda5/6e9863e8/15a809bf/1db0f2b7/2461258656/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Btu5K4pE") Thank you so much for your input \-- with the rapid changes in the political landscape, hearing from engaged voters about their opinions of our leaders is incredibly important as we plan our strategy to take back the Senate and the White House in 2020. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda5/6e9863e8/15a809bf/1db0f2b5/2461258656/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191021b.ND&refcode2=gI4OUosxhnoUV1O9kBWo")

clean_body: | | | Hello Peter, This weekend, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi made unannounced visits to Afghanistan and Jordan to assure allies that the U.S. still stands with them after Trump signalled that the U.S. will not uphold its commitments with the retreat from Syria. She's doing the work a competent president should be doing, all while pushing back against Trump and leading an impeachment inquiry. This is what we mean when we say standing up to Trump: ( "") Nancy Pelosi asserting her constitutional powers as Speaker of the House, keeping the president and his cabinet in check. Holding him accountable for his abuses of power, insults, and attacks on our democracy. Facing down a table of men and firmly standing her ground. We want to hear from Democratic voters what they think: Do you stand with Nancy Pelosi? "" "" Thank you so much for your input \-- with the rapid changes in the political landscape, hearing from engaged voters about their opinions of our leaders is incredibly important as we plan our strategy to take back the Senate and the White House in 2020. -WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

name: Team Stanton
subject: [UPDATE] Turn Out The Vote fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
A couple months ago, we shared with you that we were dedicating contributions made through some of Greg's emails to explicitly support a new Turn Out The Vote fund to help drive record voter turnout in Arizona in 2020.

**We wanted to take a moment to quick share some data below on just how _effective_ your support has already been for this cause. **

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ybw8CAvXcMwCvIsw4C_mqMcBQBt1i7aF4A13gNpbojI=/MHbu4-_TBl7QiZYVjiEcTcoyo6E3vdMhYZxlD01gMuw=?refcode=X_102119_TOTVFund_F&amount=18.67&recurring=auto)

**Every voter will count in Arizona in 2020, and our commitment to turning out the vote could make the difference for if we keep the House, take the Senate, and win back the White House next year.**

While we are excited by our progress so far, we know we will need to turn out _a lot more_ than 148 new voters in 2020 to meet our turnout goals.

**Our new goal is to raise $15,500 into the Turn Out The Vote Fund before December 31, which would be the equivalent of raising enough to hopefully canvass 500 additional new voters to vote at the polls.**

[**Will you chip in to our Turn-Out-The-Vote Fund to help us drive record turn-out for Democrats in Arizona in 2020?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ybw8CAvXcMwCvIsw4C_mqMcBQBt1i7aF4A13gNpbojI=/MHbu4-_TBl7QiZYVjiEcTcoyo6E3vdMhYZxlD01gMuw=?refcode=X_102119_TOTVFund_F&amount=18.67&recurring=auto)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ybw8CAvXcMwCvIsw4C_mqMcBQBt1i7aF4A13gNpbojI=/MHbu4-_TBl7QiZYVjiEcTcoyo6E3vdMhYZxlD01gMuw=?refcode=X_102119_TOTVFund_F&amount=100&recurring=auto) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ybw8CAvXcMwCvIsw4C_mqMcBQBt1i7aF4A13gNpbojI=/MHbu4-_TBl7QiZYVjiEcTcoyo6E3vdMhYZxlD01gMuw=?refcode=X_102119_TOTVFund_F&amount=250&recurring=auto) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ybw8CAvXcMwCvIsw4C_mqMcBQBt1i7aF4A13gNpbojI=/MHbu4-_TBl7QiZYVjiEcTcoyo6E3vdMhYZxlD01gMuw=?refcode=X_102119_TOTVFund_F&amount=5&recurring=auto)
