body:
Planned Parenthood is ready to spend $45 million to defeat President Trump and turn the Senate blue. I need your help to fight back against the pro-abortion dollars that will flood into this race to defeat me next November. Will you help, Friend? Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_s=ea3fff2c1a144f3eba92faa7e773bf3d&_t=11O0TzVmRprZ7t0w7deoRhF2YGN7mLNZwNDHtz76Z09Lb8fs78n1UlU77bmvQCaqRaiN9d83mpd5z72sm1pfzkAUfFVXgTj2dfBDmWVQZEICiNzvZgaj5sHLrsXu39CaagtM_S9jNTvB3-9bBCza0aiAJ7AuxC2OcJdMAKYsUS8%3D) | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ea3fff2c1a144f3eba92faa7e773bf3d&_e=V2B59kM4w08AkyZ3CQb3oZK6llcG6t8mneIUhAVtwlDeOpYZ2rOxhmZhk8V9RNY96pIU98wElNUUeZuzkyBhxFLpMNBoKsdsbvSPQueyCKiQHFWYMhhN1pw5BlfJKdyX1VN7yIC85SVBToBehEVzYGukBSHiIdwbUYP8_Wa3wjhAdiL_9mMmXyJked7hlr8aGsp1WCO5zwt0uDhVigGfescXN0y972b-gwdCIjoTDUTYuSJtzjNWvG0z1kKr-avDkF6LIGrPZJb6jkDTRamDbcLqZD9OHrp_-6nODm5E_0wEulVJs-CONbmt9Jzd1MqFQUhU8nkFEu-nye3W2a37y7FtWU1PrQw-U33-PwxzQtTRGyVqV5aVTpmrQ9AVJkWP)
---
**"The stakes are higher than ever, and we're coming out more powerful than ever with our largest investment ever made." — Planned Parenthood**

Friend,

It's been a critical year in the fight to defend the most vulnerable members of our society – _the unborn_.

I was honored to be the only U.S. Senator addressing this year's March for Life in Washington, D.C. where I announced my founding of the first-ever pro-life caucus in the Senate. And I've worked hard to help pass the Born-Alive Abortion Protection Act for President Trump's signature.

_But the enemies of the life movement have been paying attention, too_. Now they are getting ready to throw everything they have at us to ensure Democrats seize the U.S. Senate and crush our pro-life fight.

Planned Parenthood is ready to spend $45 million to defeat President Trump and turn the Senate blue. I need your help to fight back against the pro-abortion dollars that will flood into this race to defeat me next November. **[Will you help, Friend?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ea3fff2c1a144f3eba92faa7e773bf3d&_e=V2B59kM4w08AkyZ3CQb3oZK6llcG6t8mneIUhAVtwlDeOpYZ2rOxhmZhk8V9RNY96pIU98wElNUUeZuzkyBhxFLpMNBoKsdsbvSPQueyCKiQHFWYMhhN1pw5BlfJKdyX1VN7yIC85SVBToBehEVzYGukBSHiIdwbUYP8_Wa3wjikA6M8d6MLEcet3aVPrWFQ9qUX6C3WFfDN0uPWMFD-atYZvhBJ-uR3Wsu8TjNKlqjGYJmSnzqPRNU0_CFdeRfvbPQ1YDISCqwUgMt-13RrBkFasMphcCurr58WcntIUxA9ofLNMXWXAqEbL2w7OrNSn1iBUGF3p-ueRxsPFUbrUkBL4vfijZoynvN2WohKmPXpTwR7ZEr0mIb5yKemNA9N)**
| [** Defeat Planned Parenthood's $45 million Attack!
Support Steve Daines Today! **](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ea3fff2c1a144f3eba92faa7e773bf3d&_e=V2B59kM4w08AkyZ3CQb3oZK6llcG6t8mneIUhAVtwlDeOpYZ2rOxhmZhk8V9RNY96pIU98wElNUUeZuzkyBhxFLpMNBoKsdsbvSPQueyCKiQHFWYMhhN1pw5BlfJKdyX1VN7yIC85SVBToBehEVzYGukBSHiIdwbUYP8_Wa3wjgsxlALuY-Mq-sZLhJ7vUKj9hjeSJXsW-iEULYcR5VE8kJIhJH9lOkXq-36-eZCVAF77KoQDyR5c0jwGqyXN8zP0FZKgIDbJhVYxWGUU-psMyUHmeddiMv_wwj_ywgRIMLWi2B3zgi3AzhxqOnOx1OJVkxFZSqDpqttGNFZY5A07FA72jH-gVLl_P9-75fSGMpuAXdJL0tpLAdXcs5X_2MU)
---

Planned Parenthood's 2020 plan includes mobilizing 13 million supporters and 600 volunteer-led organizing teams across the country – _their largest effort ever_.

Friend, this is an unprecedented attack by the abortion industry, and I'm afraid if we don't prepare now, we won't be ready next year. Resources for GOP Senators are stretched thin as we defend twice as many seats as the Democrats, **[making your backing right now more important than ever.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ea3fff2c1a144f3eba92faa7e773bf3d&_e=V2B59kM4w08AkyZ3CQb3oZK6llcG6t8mneIUhAVtwlDeOpYZ2rOxhmZhk8V9RNY96pIU98wElNUUeZuzkyBhxFLpMNBoKsdsbvSPQueyCKiQHFWYMhhN1pw5BlfJKdyX1VN7yIC85SVBToBehEVzYGukBSHiIdwbUYP8_Wa3wjjToUk6SbuNtv_CGVNGZqJX-kiu4__p7InGJazqd_Y7JKPbjI-HtyBbKii7kHluwLamHdO4L5jEPMyeMotoIFyRhcCBXxNsgQeNJt81JMlMX_QLKwo3Zmgne3dwCkiN_Nc9s6kgMhk2lQYpPEJBYF3YeL2cJX0GjQvYPzF7b6uRjSiKwaHMiw9FGwWG5I078-gsh7PURDTOXNgnKkGosogx)**

**[Can I count on your immediate support that will help me prepare for this tough re-election fight and send a message to Planned Parenthood that we will not be intimidated by their unprecedented campaign? $10, $25, $50, $100 or more – every dollar will make a huge difference in protecting the unborn!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ea3fff2c1a144f3eba92faa7e773bf3d&_e=V2B59kM4w08AkyZ3CQb3oZK6llcG6t8mneIUhAVtwlDeOpYZ2rOxhmZhk8V9RNY96pIU98wElNUUeZuzkyBhxFLpMNBoKsdsbvSPQueyCKiQHFWYMhhN1pw5BlfJKdyX1VN7yIC85SVBToBehEVzYGukBSHiIdwbUYP8_Wa3wjgc0PJsn-XUqXIrV0gsyIQ_m6dMsO9ZIKqwGuKPYxCH8QxPPCUlVOWw1jeV4aAhwNzMYv5ZrR-DIYs9Zj4XuCy0zUBSPyBlIRQaJ2PgjArk7i6JUHiOHAv_aTxNnt-FipyOwwg7g0E2sF0M_9NQhaXIe9JvZZexHpeJaZXKORBzrhAizwss2uPNL884kyAzdXgQCZVvX4pYk4VxIp1lUiAk)**

Friend, you know me as one of the Senate's staunchest defenders of life and I will never back down from this fight, but it would mean so much to have you in my corner as we take on the tens of millions of dollars Planned Parenthood will spend next year.

**[Please help however you can!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ea3fff2c1a144f3eba92faa7e773bf3d&_e=V2B59kM4w08AkyZ3CQb3oZK6llcG6t8mneIUhAVtwlDeOpYZ2rOxhmZhk8V9RNY96pIU98wElNUUeZuzkyBhxFLpMNBoKsdsbvSPQueyCKiQHFWYMhhN1pw5BlfJKdyX1VN7yIC85SVBToBehEVzYGukBSHiIdwbUYP8_Wa3wjjkjeuSfoJ8l6YVl8ZKG1yylVWQGKRHgOa2Q-14Mf7bjgKi_BkE2O6HCSUcTZJMAGLSLO-Obg47bkVXu3TvCPiUw0Ys88GQbnfCSKrCfV5J453cGo-8bqdMPBLrA7c3_djyOlL2X0rnVWl_uo-XN0Y6_UNneUyhScPxz5KhNNeUXoS1bqWPFZSipHOhlshlwKZqrkdM8eUkk1VoPInPypAm) **

Thanks,

Senator Steve Daines

[** Defeat Planned Parenthood's $45 million Attack!
Support Steve Daines Today! **](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ea3fff2c1a144f3eba92faa7e773bf3d&_e=V2B59kM4w08AkyZ3CQb3oZK6llcG6t8mneIUhAVtwlDeOpYZ2rOxhmZhk8V9RNY96pIU98wElNUUeZuzkyBhxFLpMNBoKsdsbvSPQueyCKiQHFWYMhhN1pw5BlfJKdyX1VN7yIC85SVBToBehEVzYGukBSHiIdwbUYP8_Wa3wjiQ544-gu5OqO_XotKSi3R3yvffwzLYvEY_T-oH3fjdRWjva20crdW4UPOGCG6Wor0X03PIBUYpF-ga14-ISvfmLcHTzAvtmqakiHwykKFC29RL-ikhLTLfFshXQPe-dtAVo3pU_vv7DhHAY9K3teWLpukUq_z6hTF9jDCmRSWHAKfZ_DjGdI4T_xd-YL7gt9nLnE81U2i92Sz-QXso55Ck)

_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. name: Team Beto
subject: Monday campaign report
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

This is
a critical week for Team Beto. This is what we’re up against:

- Beto still isn’t qualified for the November Debate. The amount of
money we raise this week will largely determine if we can qualify in
time.

- A lot of powerful people are angry at Beto. They’re scared of the fact
that Beto has the gumption to say what he really thinks and campaigns on
issues that he actually believes in.

- We’re facing more attacks than ever. Trump has attacked Beto in speech
after speech. The NRA knows we’re serious about gun reform so they’ve
been pushing attack ads against our campaign.

To put it bluntly: our attackers –– Trump, the NRA, Republican talking
heads –– want to see us fail and would love to see Beto not qualify for
the November debate.

Let’s prove them wrong.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39317?refcode=ema20191021-62735&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=62735%2E444211%2ErvyoHV ]Will you chip in $3 and show that we’re fighting harder
than ever to qualify Beto for the debate and bring his message of courage
to the forefront of this election?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39317?refcode=ema20191021-62735&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=62735%2E444211%2ErvyoHV ]Contribute $3

We made it a point for our campaign to not accept a single cent from the
super PACS or special interests that have influenced our elections. Those
special interests are how we got Trump in the first place.

In making that decision, we placed our full trust in our supporters. We’re
counting on you to help us take on the powerful forces that have
controlled our politics for too long.

Lots of people are watching whether our grassroots movement will rally to
help us qualify for the November debate. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39317?refcode=ema20191021-62735&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=62735%2E444211%2ErvyoHV ]Will you show them that Team
Beto supporters are stepping up to fight and chip in $3
today?

- Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191021footer&t=1022&refcode2=62735_444211_rvyoHV&akid=62735%2E444211%2ErvyoHV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=62735%2E444211%2ErvyoHV

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

Those special interests are how we got Trump in the first place. In making that decision, we placed our full trust in our supporters. We’re counting on you to help us take on the powerful forces that have controlled our politics for too long. Lots of people are watching whether our grassroots movement will rally to help us qualify for the November debate. [ ]Will you show them that Team Beto supporters are stepping up to fight and chip in $3 today? - Team Beto Contribute to Beto's campaign:

name: Warren for President
subject: We're asking you to make your first contribution to this grassroots movement. Can Elizabeth count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Here's another number we're proud of: Two million. Two million grassroots donations from Americans across this country who chip in what they can because they believe in the movement | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528121/45c30650/102ebd6d2/66f30d88/1729615851/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Here's a number we're proud of: Zero.

Zero contributions from private fundraisers. Zero contributions from federal lobbyists or health care or fossil fuel executives. Zero contributions from corporate PACs.

Here's another number we're proud of: Two million. **Two million grassroots donations from Americans across this country who chip in what they can because they believe in the movement we're building together.**

That's powerful. That's big, structural change.

Every day, you are helping prove that you don't need the corporate machine to create big, structural change -- and we're so thankful to you for making it possible.

**But as we push forward to return economic and political power into the hands of the people, we all need to continue our commitment to this fight. And that's why we're asking you to make your first contribution to this grassroots movement. Can Elizabeth count on you?**

**[If you're able to, please chip in $3 or anything you can to help grow our movement across the country:](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528121/45c30650/102ebd6d2/66f30d8b/1729615851/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSzgxRl9UTUNfQlNDX1BfMjAxOTIwMjFfVjFTMyJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK81F_TMC_BSC_P_20192021_V1S3")**

name: Mike Turner
subject: It is imperative that we keep Ohio Red in 2020!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDA5MzcxNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTYyMTk2NTU0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Since Pelosi and her Squad took over the House majority in 2018, they have done nothing but play obstructionist politics and try to stop the economic progress we have made.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDA5MzcxNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTk2NTU0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDA5MzcxNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTk2NTU0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,
It's official: [_**I will be running for reelection in 2020!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDA5MzcxNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTk2NTU0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Since Pelosi and her Squad took over the House majority in 2018, they have done nothing but play obstructionist politics and try to stop the economic progress we have made.
[_**It is imperative that we take strides to win back the House if we are to get America back on track!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDA5MzcxNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTk2NTU0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Our country faces many challenges including a devastating opioid crisis, a broken veterans healthcare system, and we need to make sure individuals with pre-existing medical conditions have access to high quality healthcare. I am a leader in efforts to protect access to healthcare for all Ohioans.
I also support Wright-Patterson Air Force Base and our local military men and women. I continue to work to bring jobs and funding to this important base to our local economy.
I can't do this without your support. [_**I need your help, and I need it now!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDA5MzcxNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTk2NTU0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Liberals are eyeing this seat as a key pickup in their efforts to grow their majority. They plan to give my opponent unlimited resources to flip this seat. [_**Peter, can I count on your support to defeat the Democrats and their dark money efforts to win here?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDA5MzcxNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTk2NTU0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
If Republicans can't hold onto this seat then we won't have a chance to take back the House in 2020. [_**I am asking for your help to keep a key Republican seat Red in November!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDA5MzcxNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTk2NTU0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**Donate Today!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDA5MzcxNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTk2NTU0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,
Mike Turner
**[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDA5MzcxNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTk2NTU0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
---
120 W. Second St. #1510 Dayton, OH 45402

name: Peter Khalil
subject: #MMIW and 10 Weeks of Screensides!
body:
| | | | #MMIW
---
---
**—**
It has now been 10 weeks since I broadcast my first Screenside Chat. For ten weeks, I've been coming to you in digital form to give you campaign news and to discuss issues that emerged prominently during my talks with you.
This week, #MMIW. Find out what that means [here](https://u10586488.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=W9Smq9u-2FGdEKDZ-2FVYToYN0v8dyBhj65ioiMPhCuc-2BLjj4SjlHCalO8iMBRt8f15-2F_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFlXvvEpEZOb1revOs71Gl5x2nBWQxvCPgwb7OcKu5AohXpUGfCecE0OYIOTQXaE9LgSrdBnTtEOAOZq3NJ4jfTQXwYbVJd6KeVUp-2FAcBLh9n9WWT5my5HEf34GShIeDOHw824nVF57aJ9C2XlR-2Bf2SRATl7BjsRVG3CetfdctxE-2B3YQjGnDt4Ke-2Bj0soM4GiaS0Fi-2FzPonSj-2FQtx3zoijVCR5cUixEdxGg6Vinojrv6mpfG6-2BIoALlwKWnp1Jl8ukj-2BCu9TFyXMxCY-2FzLP5yAokMmiu9TII9YAvrC1rS91G0yhInfnHcInHXd-2FnJQjDbhXchK5ZUnNbD94PCIVUbmyYuBIbEcjoqzEgrBdGzqJBKT8XM93vyZ2Mwg2qX9V4ga3OtyTQqH5xoqc7nrUK60h7p1NmQ-2BcvKdQj7ag57UPQi-2FMijJeepeJWR6vWwZLA8igXi-2ByJcxbmVmAnBhtqb4q23B-2F5YLOs5Hi5ZXk0G5wMbeI2oketH0JimrBUXFdfvQxuJuorM2O8vhgDGbiqYsxrfRSshnMD5Ny1twaYEDw-2BA-3D-3D). It's vitally important we address this domestic atrocity as a nation if we are to claim to be a global protector of human rights. With gratitude, Peter

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: One giant leap for womankind
body:
Far above our atmosphere, Astronauts Christina Koch and Jessica Meir stepped outside the International Space Station on Friday. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9dbaac189e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 21, 2019
---
| | |
# **WATCH: One giant leap for womankind**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a70e8e90c2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Far above our atmosphere,** Astronauts Christina Koch and Jessica Meir stepped outside the International Space Station on Friday—the first-ever all-female spacewalk.

**President Donald J. Trump** called them from the White House during their historic mission, marking the first time since 1969 that an American President has spoken to our astronauts while they were outside their spaceship.

**“I just want to congratulate** you both. You’re very brave, brilliant women, and you represent this country so well,” the President said. “Our country is very proud of you.”

**During the call,** the astronauts praised all the female pioneers who came before them and made this incredible moment possible. “There has been a long line of female scientists, explorers, engineers, and astronauts, and we have followed in their footsteps to get us where we are today,” Dr. Meir said.

**“We hope** that we can provide an inspiration to everybody [who] has a big dream and that is willing to work hard to make that dream come true,” she added. “Something that all of us that have made our way up here have done all throughout our lives. And I can tell you, the hard work certainly did pay off.”

[In photos: President Trump calls in for the first all-female spacewalk.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dbb14807fb&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬****President Trump:** [This is a “first step”—the next stop is the Moon.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99d3b37797&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **See the biggest moments from today’s Cabinet meeting**

**President Trump** allowed the press to sit in on his Cabinet meeting [for over an hour](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ea22d6ed4&e=3ee4985eea) today—yet another example of how this President is the most open, transparent, and media-friendly leader in our country’s recent history.

**Three important moments** from the President’s opening remarks are worth your time in particular:
* **🎬** [“We’re bringing our troops back home. I got elected on bringing our soldiers back home.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=409fa7e1e9&e=3ee4985eea) It might not be very popular with defense contractors inside the Beltway, the President said, but it draws the loudest cheers across America.

* **🎬** [On impeachment, you don’t have to guess Congressional Democrats’ motives](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f1fe7b4bf9&e=3ee4985eea): They’ve told you themselves. “If we don't impeach this President, he will get re-elected,” according to one Democrat member.

* **🎬** [The blue-collar, middle-class Trump Economy also speaks for itself](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d30455ed93&e=3ee4985eea), even if the Washington media and political classes aren’t listening. Wage growth under President Trump has topped the past two administrations— _multiple times over_.

---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Tia Dufour
| **President Donald J. Trump, joined by Vice President Mike Pence, delivers remarks during a Cabinet meeting** | October 21, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eff1d64d16&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ea8074f26a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=7a7700d387)
---

## In the News: A Few of This Week's Stories
### Boston Herald: _Republican Bill Weld to New Hampshire Democrats: Vote for me in primary_
"Republican presidential candidate Bill Weld is beefing up his New Hampshire campaign and urging Democrats there to re-register as “Undeclared” by Friday — so Granite State Dems can vote for him in the nation’s first primary against President Trump."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=M_ahLUVJ8XpyMWq3jSlm0huJjQ627IzuJGj35Sm-UzIWFGOcogAkHACuSvtynrjOoAwOBHnNL2cWXZ2Qm6HaPFZHA8TYp3qa-JKb839LSpDBsj9XSMJMduA2BfN24A-tEhbn85XERwRSp4vvamLb7w&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191021_newsletter_s&n=4)
### WCAX3: _Republican presidential hopeful Bill Weld stops by Vermont_
"The many Democrats for president are filing through New Hampshire ahead of the primary, but one of President Trump's Republican opponents is hitting up Vermont."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=T9s3Wk46-GafbDbm4obzgX22IWX8Dfpw0x8hMtYF0wRkuLkP3HnaIuObmWWkWd9Kyg1aBTBvANPRbCIyQCG48a9AeL3mmzuRPhwM1FVqqJA2J5hNPNNfcPDFc2cQtiSQdcVEIXyCrzPfAxNpCiLOFQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191021_newsletter_s&n=5)
### Boston Herald: _Bill Weld talks strategy against Trump after boost in FPU-Herald Poll_
"Former Massachusetts Gov. William F. Weld put on confident show about his chances against President Trump while speaking at Tufts University Wednesday — blasting Republican efforts to manipulate the GOP primary while enjoying increasing support in New Hampshire in a new Franklin Pierce University-Boston Herald poll."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=M_ahLUVJ8XpyMWq3jSlm0huJjQ627IzuJGj35Sm-UzK1DwWlasT_72k2LRAhbL-Hb5gEhKrYuAtWOsOGKt_RoYKaE9rBcM-8t-_bJY846HeiObahfE1jems8GuiwqO39yzasMpMaNSLfruZ7HfMJYg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191021_newsletter_s&n=6)
### The Tufts Daily:_Weld outlines presidential platform at Tisch College Event_
"Republican presidential candidate Bill Weld visited Tufts for a town hall event held in Paige Hall yesterday, where Weld addressed students, faculty and guests. The event was organized by the Jonathan M. Tisch College for Civic Life and co-hosted by Tisch and Tufts Republicans."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=wyIOAYFw5wtTb4ADuOEolGsR8x7MUKHSsLPqX5t3ofWnfM4jR-FRosj0Q6R_RDqseLTIptFbkxlczbCtmVPRBJV5VtS4R5DhrXVt93vf5jSIGtw4vLaY7Ea1_zWmCXDa&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191021_newsletter_s&n=7)

Derrick Dickey

Today’s Democrat Party is the party of socialized medicine, the “Green New Deal,” and open borders. Their radical agenda would undo our results, which have helped create the greatest economic turnaround in modern history.

And now, they’re targeting Georgia. Every Democrat running for President will be here. They will be raising millions from their liberal donors and enjoying the constant benefit of the national liberal media.

We must hold them accountable, together. David has asked us to make sure each of our supporters helps us hold the Democrats running for President accountable.

Take the Democrat Accountability Survey now. (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/debateinga-accountability-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct21prospects)

We know the battle for the White House and Senate majority will be decided here in Georgia. So do the Democrats. That’s why the next debate is happening here. We have to push back now, starting by holding the Democrats accountable for their support of radical liberal policies.

Take the Democrat Accountability Survey now. (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/debateinga-accountability-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct21prospects)

Thank you for everything.

Team Perdue

name: Addisu Demissie
subject: We're being outraised and outspent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, Now that every presidential campaign has filed their financial reports with the FEC, we took a closer look at the state of the race. There's no hiding that some campaigns are kicking off the fourth quarter with a sizable head start. Bernie Sanders has $33 million cash on hand, Elizabeth Warren has $25 million, and Pete Buttigieg has $23 million. To be honest, we're not surprised that we're a bit behind.
